title: Phase 10A: Pricing module - quote exposure, price history, simulator, margin waterfall
description: Build pricing module secondary UI: open quote exposure list, price history viewer, quote simulator with bulk impact analysis, and margin waterfall chart.
steps: Create src/app/(dashboard)/pricing/quotes-at-risk/page.tsx with open quote exposure list
Show quotes affected by cost changes with estimated margin impact
Create src/components/pricing/price-history.tsx with price history viewer chart
Display cost and sell price trends over time with Recharts
Implement bulk impact analysis: what-if scenarios for price changes across product groups
Show margin decomposition: list price -> customer price -> cost -> margin
